character.name: Anthropomorphic small stout owl creature, NO ARMS — wings fold tightly against wide round body like a tucked cloak. Wide barrel-shaped body, short and stocky, much wider than tall. Large round flat facial disc face, big round amber-gold (#D4A24C) eyes staring forward, serious focused expression. Prominent pointed ear tufts curving upward on top of head. Short hooked dark beak. Dark walnut brown (#5C3D2E) feathers covering head, back, folded wings, ear tufts, outer body. Warm amber (#C49A3C) chest medallion marking and ear tuft tips. Cream (#F0E6D2) flat facial disc and round belly with fine brown barring pattern. Dark gray small taloned feet, two legs planted wide and firm. Stout and grounded like Noctowl or Hoothoot — wise sentinel energy, NOT cute baby owl, NOT tall, NOT lean, NOT angular. Cozy indie pixel art style, Pokémon Gen 3 starter readability, Stardew Valley warmth. Limited palette ~10 colors, no anti-aliasing, crisp 1-bit outlines, black outline color, transparent background, front-facing, 48 pixel height.
